# netbox_vrf (Data Source)

Fetches a VRF from NetBox by name or RD.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name` (String) The name of the VRF to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the VRF.
- `id` (Number) The ID of the VRF.
- `rd` (String) The route distinguisher of the VRF.
- `tenant` (Number) The tenant ID associated with the VRF.
